_note: Capture suite. Each scenario pins its own persona phone so it is its own dashboard conversation. Run with MIRROR_OUTBOUND=1 and identity override UNSET so the boondi-crm record is keyed to the persona. expect.crm/crmNone assert capture from the flow log; expectRecord is checked by verify-capture.mjs against the DB + dashboard.

turns.text: Hi! What's something really good and sweet you'd recommend?
I want to send a small box of mithai to a friend for her birthday — just one box.

scenarios.name: occasion-gifter-wedding
scenarios._note: Occasion gifter (wedding). t1 reliably captures a query AND asks the five Qs as a point-list; classification (gifting_personal + wedding_event) is set on t1. WHICH later turn the agent upgrades query->lead varies run-to-run (multi-turn upgrade timing is non-deterministic even with thinking; single-message leads are covered reliably by scenarios 4/5), so t2's capture tool is not pinned and the final status is left flexible — only the cumulative classification is asserted.

turns.text: We're getting married next month and want favour boxes for the guests.
Around 150 boxes, budget about 600 per box, all in Mumbai, need them in 3 weeks.
We need Diwali gift boxes for our 300 staff. I'm at arav@acmecorp.com — can you help?
Corporate gifting for our clients across Mumbai and Delhi, ~120 boxes, with our logo printed on them.
Just checking you out — a friend mentioned your sweets are amazing.
Where is my order? Has it shipped yet?
My last order arrived stale and I want a refund. Very disappointed.
What's the weather in Mumbai today?

scenarios.name: progressive-qualification
scenarios._note: Progressive: t1 captures a soft query; the agent then accumulates fields and becomes a SCORED LEAD by the end. WHICH turn it upgrades/updates on varies run-to-run (LLM, non-deterministic), so only t1 (query) and the cumulative scored-lead record are asserted; the per-turn t2/t3 capture tools are shown in the trace, not pinned.

turns.text: Thinking about corporate Diwali hampers for the office.
We'd need them in about 10 days, delivered to our Pune office.
We might want around 80 gift boxes for our team this Diwali.
